With Roderika now at Roundtable Hold, pick up the Golden Seed she left at Stormhill Shack.
Travel to Fort Haight West and make your way into Fort Haight:
Pick up Bloodrose x3 from the corpse on the ground.
In the room up the first set of stairs is the Nomadic Warrior's Cookbook [6].
Kill the Godrick Knight on the upper level to receive Ash of War: Bloody Slash, then pick up the Bloodrose x5 behind him.
Head down the wooden staircase to the right of the ladder to find a Smithing Stone [1].
Climb the ladder to the top for a chest with the Dectus Medallion (Left).
Return to Kenneth Haight on top of the arched ruin to receive the Erdsteel Dagger. Exhaust his dialogue and pledge service to him.
Re-enter the fort and talk to Kenneth Haight where the knight was.
Travel to the Church of Elleh and head north to find the entrance to Groveside Cave:
Activate the Groveside Cave grace inside and equip your lantern.
Below the ledge in the room is a Cracked Pot.
Pick up the Glowstone x3 and Golden Rune [1] in the water.
Kill the Beastman of Farum Azula for Flamedrake Talisman and 1,000 runes.
Travel to Agheel Lake North and head northeast toward a camp with Kaiden Sellswords. Pick up the Armorer's Cookbook [1] in front of some pots.
Just past the camp you'll see a pack of wolves. Pick up the Golden Rune [2] below the pack leader.
Below the ledge east of the wolves, you'll discover the Murkwater Coast grace.
Drop down northeast of the grace, where the edge of the ruin meets the cliff, and pick up the Poisonbloom x2 on a boulder in the water.
Use the spiritspring while facing southeast to reach a shack. Pick up the Smithing Stone [1] next to it and interact with the painting inside for the "Homing Instinct" Painting.
Grab the Artist's Shack grace just outside the shack.
On the rocky ledge near the grace is an exploding scarab that drops a Somber Smithing Stone [1].
Return to the spiritspring, then follow the water northwest to reach Murkwater Catacombs:
Head inside and activate the Murkwater Catacombs grace.
Pick up the 2x Grave Glovewort [1] in the first corridor.
In the room straight ahead is a corpse with Root Resin x5 and a lever that, when pulled, unlocks the door to the boss.
Pick up the Ghost Glovewort [1] on the way to the boss.
Kill the Grave Warden Duelist for Banished Knight Engvall and 1,700 runes.
Return to the catacomb entrance and head along the water until you get invaded by Bloody Finger Nerijus. Kill him to obtain the Reduvia.
Optional: Head back along the water after killing Nerijus and talk to Yura below a ruin, where the jellyfish were.
Look for a cave opening along the western cliff, where you got invaded, to find Murkwater Cave:
Head inside and grab the Murkwater Cave grace.
Loot Mushroom x5 from the chest straight ahead.
Open the chest in the boss room to obtain Cloth Garb and Cloth Trousers.
MISSABLE: After opening the chest, you'll be ambushed by Patches. Bring his HP below 50% without killing him and he'll surrender, giving you Golden Rune [1] x2 and the Grovel for Mercy gesture.
Talk to the now friendly Patches after the fight; your answer doesn't matter.

MISSABLE: Remove your weapon and punch him until he becomes hostile. Let him hit you until you're almost dead and he'll give you the Extreme Repentance gesture. Either use it in front of him, or let him kill you.
Optional: Reload the area and talk to Patches about the bandits, then about the new chest.
After opening the new chest, turn around and grab the Gold-Tinged Excrement x5, Golden Rune [5], and Throwing Dagger x5 in the pond.
Ride west-northwest past the sleeping Runebear to find the Mistwood Outskirts grace near a road.
Rest at the grace, then follow the cliff edge west-southwest of the grace to a ruin. Pick up the Golden Rune [1] hanging from its edge.
MISSABLE: Return to Patches to learn the Calm Down! gesture.

Note: I strongly recommend buying Margit's Shackle from Patches. It can reveal illusory walls, trigger fire-breathing pillars, and (in the DLC) unlock sealed spiritsprings and break pots hanging from cliffs, all from a safe distance.
Exit the cave and continue along the water to find a corpse with Fire Grease under a bridge.
Head south-southwest past the bridge for a corpse with Arteria Leaf surrounded by Land Squirts behind a stone coffin.
Kill the scarab southeast of the coffin for Ash of War: Unsheathe, but be wary of the Giant Crabs burrowed in the water.
Pick up Crab Eggs from the nearby corpse surrounded by smaller crabs.
Head toward the ruin west of the crabs and pick up the Slumbering Egg on top of it.
Optional: Talk to Yura under the ruin.
Grab the Seaside Ruins grace next to the cliff just west of the ruin.
On top of a rock north-northwest of the grace is a Golden Rune [1] guarded by some bats.
Continue northwest along the ledge, then drop down to see the Incantation Scarab appear in front of some gravestones (painting reward).
Kill Flying Dragon Agheel in the lake for Dragon Heart and 5,000 runes.
Optional: If you die, you can return to Yura and exhaust his dialogue. His summon sign will then be available near a flat ruin in the lake.
In the northern corner of the lake lies the entrance to Limgrave Tunnels:
Instead of taking the lift, drop down to the left of it for a Golden Rune [4] in a narrow tunnel.
Drop down all the way and activate the Limgrave Tunnels grace at the bottom.
Pick up the Smithing Stone [1] on the wall next to the first miner.
On the wall next to the miner down the first set of stairs is another Smithing Stone [1].
Pick up the Smithing Stone [1] in an alcove on the ground level.
Follow the southwest tunnel to a room with a Smithing Stone [1] and some rats.
Take the other tunnel to a lift and ride it to the bottom. Loot Large Glintstone Scrap x5 inside a hut.
In the area around the hut, you'll find 2x Smithing Stone [1].
Take the lift back up, then drop off while facing southeast to continue. On the wall between the two paths is a Smithing Stone [1].
Pick up Glintstone Scrap x3 from the right path.
Take the other path for a Smithing Stone [1] next to the miner near the lift.
Drop down to the left of the lift for a Golden Rune [1] on a ledge, then drop to the ledge below it for a Somber Smithing Stone [1].
Grab a final Smithing Stone [1] from the right wall before the boss.
Kill the Stonedigger Troll for Roar Medallion and 1,800 runes.
Travel to Agheel Lake North and pass time until nightfall. Follow the road southeast and kill the Night's Cavalry on the bridge for Ash of War: Repeating Thrust and 2,400 runes.
On top of the cliff east of the bridge, at the base of a gibbet, you'll find a Gold-Pickled Fowl Foot.
Stop the caravan traveling the road below, then loot the Greataxe in the back of the carriage.
Continue along the road until it meets a large ruin blocking the path. Pick up the Smoldering Butterfly x4 nearby.
On the hill near the blocked road lies Waypoint Ruins:
In a small alley in the back of the ruins is a corpse with Glowstone x2.
Loot the Immunizing Cured Meat and Golden Rune [1] around the Miranda Blossom in the center.
Hanging off the wall above the Miranda Blossom is a corpse with Trina's Lily x4.
Head down the cellar visible from the top of the wall and kill the Mad Pumpkin Head for 1,100 runes.
Grab the Waypoint Ruins Cellar grace and talk to Sellen. Answer "I want to learn sorcery", then "I still want to learn" to receive the Nod In Thought gesture.
Kill the lone Noble Sorcerer on the hillside south of Waypoint Ruins, below the ruin, to obtain the Glintstone Staff (first time).
Loot 3x Golden Rune [1], Golden Rune [2], and a Golden Rune [3] from the nearby cemetery.
Head toward the camp on the slope just south of the cemetery. In front of a tent on the left side sits a chest containing the Great Epee.
Continue up the slope for a Golden Rune [1], then pick up the Royal House Scroll on top of the ruin next to it.
An astrolabe with Starlight Shards sits at the edge of a small cliff south-southeast of the ruin.
On a lower ledge, west-southwest of the astrolabe, is a gibbet with a Golden Rune [1] next to it.
Drop onto the road and follow it northwest while hugging the right wall to a slope. Kill the lone enemy on the slope and he'll turn into a Runebear that drops a Larval Tear.
Optional: Talk to Yura under the ruin just west of the slope.
Travel to The First Step and head west-northwest toward the beach. Down the slope with a Troll, you'll find an invisible scarab that drops Ash of War: Stamp (Sweep).
Pick up the Strip of White Flesh next to a campfire at the north end of the beach.
Follow the shoreline to a corpse with Land Octopus Ovary beside a fallen tree.
Continue along the shoreline to find the Nomadic Merchant (West Limgrave) under a ruin.
Near the waterfall at the end of the beach is a Gold-Pickled Fowl Foot.
Head back along the beach while hugging the cliff to discover the entrance to Coastal Cave:
Grab the Coastal Cave grace, then talk to Boc next to it.
The only item in this cave is a Land Octopus Ovary just outside the boss room.
Kill the two Demi-Human Chiefs for Tailoring Tools, Sewing Needle and 1,200 runes.
Optional: Old Knight Istvan's summon sign can be found just outside the room.
A corpse with Smoldering Butterfly lies in the tunnel past the boss.
Continue through the tunnel to emerge on a small island, then head uphill and grab the Church of Dragon Communion grace.
Optional: Examine the altar in the church and buy any dragon communion incantations you need.
Climb the slanted ruin next to the church to find Exalted Flesh at the top.
Northwest of the ruin, next to some trees at the edge, lies a corpse with Great Dragonfly Head x4.
Follow the cliff edge south-southeast to a scarab that drops a Somber Smithing Stone [1].
Continue along the edge to find a Smithing Stone [2].
Return to Boc in Coastal Cave and give him the sewing needle.
